description: Create a daily GitHub Actions workflow named test-p4tc-ubuntu that runs on a schedule, on push to main, and on pull requests to main. The workflow should cancel any in-progress runs on non-main branches and only run on pull requests labeled with 'p4tc'. Use an ubuntu-22.04 job that checks out the repository with submodules, sets up ccache, builds with a custom script, and runs specific tests with ctest.
